title: [FIRRTL] InferWidths infers width for Analog that's unsatisifiable, should error (?)

features.name: unsatisfiable width inference for multi-bit inout aliasing
features.description: Code should include an inout port with inferred width attached to inout ports of incompatible explicit widths

features.name: unsized signal width constraint from multiple attach targets
features.description: Code should include an unsized signal constrained by multiple explicitly-sized signals via attach/alias operations where no single width satisfies all constraints
